display_information.name: OpenClaw
display_information.long_description: OpenClaw is an open-source AI coding assistant that provides intelligent code completion, refactoring, and debugging capabilities. It features deep understanding of code context, multi-language support, and seamless IDE integration. Perfect for developers seeking an alternative to proprietary AI coding tools with full data privacy and self-hosted deployment options.
display_information.description: OpenClaw AI Assistant - Open-source Coding Partner

assistant_view.assistant_description: OpenClaw is an open-source AI coding assistant with intelligent code completion, refactoring, and debugging capabilities. It provides multi-language support, real-time suggestions, and self-hosted deployment for complete data privacy.

suggested_prompts.title: 💡 Brainstorm
suggested_prompts.message: In brainstorming mode, analyze the current project architecture, identify three areas for improvement, and explain the value and implementation approach

suggested_prompts.title: 📝 Create Issue
suggested_prompts.message: Create a GitHub Issue using the project's defined Issue template, describing an important bug or feature request in the project

suggested_prompts.title: 🔀 Create PR
suggested_prompts.message: Create a pull request based on current code changes using the project's defined PR template

suggested_prompts.title: 🔍 Code Review
suggested_prompts.message: Conduct a comprehensive code review of the current branch, including DRY principles, SOLID principles, clean architecture, code quality, security vulnerabilities, and performance optimization
